heading: Assistance in furtherance of narcotics control objectives of United States
label: 1736g–1 Assistance in furtherance of narcotics control objectives of United States
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1990 Amendment note under .Jan. 1, 1991section 1513 of Pub. L. 101–624section 1691 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1990 Amendment note under .Jan. 1, 1991section 1513 of Pub. L. 101–624section 1691 of this title

children.heading: Substantial injury
children.label: a Substantial injury
children.text: Local currencies that are made available for use under this chapter may not be used to finance the production for export of agricultural commodities (or products thereof) that would compete in the world market with similar agricultural commodities (or products thereof) produced in the United States, if such competition would cause substantial injury to the United States producers, as determined by the President.

children.heading: Exception for narcotics control
children.label: b Exception for narcotics control
children.text: Notwithstanding subsection (a), the President may provide assistance under this chapter, including assistance through the use of local currencies generated by the sale of commodities under such chapter, for economic development activities undertaken in an eligible country that is a major illicit drug producing country (as defined in section 2291(i)(2) of title 22), for the purpose of reducing the dependence of the economy of such country on the production of crops from which narcotic and psychotropic drugs are derived.1So in original. Probably should be section “2291(e)(2)”.1
